name: Trent Lott
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, I recently endorsed Gov. John Kasich's candidacy for President because he has both the record of accomplishment and positive vision for the future of our country that I think we need more than ever before.

**John 's campaign has a critical fundraising deadline on Wednesday **and it'll be an important opportunity to show our growing momentum. **[Will you consider chipping in to help?
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30680116:Wc0DZzmDN:m:1:958431888:A0B0BE293DC8C098FAA90137302333D9:r)**

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30680117:Wc0DZzmDN:m:1:958431888:A0B0BE293DC8C098FAA90137302333D9:r)

I served in Congress with John when he led the charge to balance the federal budget for the first time since man walked on the moon. **I was there and I can tell you that it got done because of John 's leadership and determination**.

Recent polls show that John Kasich is the only Republican candidate defeating Hillary Clinton in both New Hampshire and Ohio. [With your help we can win the primary and go on to win the White House](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30680116:Wc0DZzmDN:m:1:958431888:A0B0BE293DC8C098FAA90137302333D9:r).

**I 'm on Team Kasich because John Kasich is for us.** \- [I hope you'll consider chipping in with a generous contribution right now to help](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30680116:Wc0DZzmDN:m:1:958431888:A0B0BE293DC8C098FAA90137302333D9:r).

Thank you for all that you're doing to support John and make America stronger!

**Trent Lott**
Former U.S. Senate Majority Leader
[JohnKasich.com

subject: re: Fellow Conservative 's donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Are you ok?

Rand asked me to reach out to you.

The September 30th End of Quarter fundraising
deadline is just over 24 hours away and Rand needs your immediate
support before time runs out.

But according to our records, we haven't
received your contribution yet.

Fellow Conservative
dpwillis67@gmail.com
DONATION STATUS: ## MISSING ##

This is by far THE most critical fundraising
deadline of Rand's campaign. Every dollar you can give right now
is critical.

So PLEASE make your most generous
contribution right away. And remember -- the more you give, the
more Rand's campaign can do.

Thanks,
Alexandra

---------- BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE ----------

From: Rand Paul [rand.paul@randpaul2016.com]
To: Alexandra
Subject: Fellow Conservative 's donation

Alexandra,

Please do me a quick favor and contact
Fellow Conservative .

I've emailed Fellow Conservative multiple times this past
week about my September 30th End of Quarter deadline and still
haven't heard back yet.

My deadline is just over 24 hours away -- and
I need Fellow Conservative's support to prove I have the grassroots muscle to
win.

Every dollar Fellow Conservative can give will help me
pay critical travel bills for the campaign stops, bumper
stickers, phone banks, U.S. mail, social media outreach and
Internet and TV ads it will take to surge to the top.

It's so critical I have a strong quarter, so
please follow up with Fellow Conservative as soon as you can.

Thanks, Alexandra!

Rand

Sent from my iPhone

From: Rand Paul [rand.paul@randpaul2016.com]
To: Fellow Conservative [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
Subject: Announcement

Dear Fellow Conservative:

The Big Government political establishment
was supposed to have this all sewn up by now.

But polls show the race for the Republican
nomination for President of the United States is wide open.

And with the September 30th End of Quarter
Fundraising Deadline rapidly approaching, I'm not going to mince
words.

This is by far THE most critical fundraising
deadline I've ever faced. PERIOD.

So I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE action.

The press and the Big Government
establishment of BOTH parties are already sniffing around to see
if my campaign has the grassroots support and resources it will
take to surge to the top of the Republican Primary polls.

They know Americans have begun to zero in on
the race for the White House with the launch of the Republican
debates -- and are just now digging into candidates' records and
plans.

And they know this is the last FEC reporting
deadline before all candidates begin their massive end of year
push to 2016.

As more punches are thrown, polls will
change. This massive field of 15 Republican candidates is going
to quickly start whittling down to just a handful.

My campaign is laying the groundwork to surge
to the top.

But it's so critical I have a strong quarter.
So I'm counting on your support.

From the very moment I launched my candidacy
for the presidency of the United States, Democrats and their pals
in the press have gone all-out to SMEAR me.

It hasn't worked.

Many polls show I'm the ONLY Republican
candidate to beat leading Democrat Hillary Clinton in five key
swing states President Obama won in both 2008 and 2012.

We have an unmatched and growing
on-the-ground presence in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and
Nevada.

Energy is sky-high as GOP loyalists and
political newcomers step forward to "Stand With Rand" and fuel an
exploding volunteer base.

These patriots are seeing firsthand that my
campaign is the real deal.

You see, I didn't run for the U.S. Senate in
2010 because I was "next in line" or some high-powered consultant
thought I'd make a great candidate.

I had a great life as a physician back home
in Kentucky -- a life I was sad to let go.

But I ran for political office because I felt
it was time that good people stood up and fought for the America
we so dearly love. I ran because I was worried about the future
of our country.

I worried that the "land of the free" is
becoming the land of the regulated, taxed and spied on.

I'm running for President because I'm still
worried. And I know you are too.

Today, we're $18.3 TRILLION in debt. The
Middle East is spiraling out of control.

Members of BOTH parties openly sneer at the
constitutional liberties that have made our nation the greatest
and freest on earth.

I believe we can right the ship.

I believe we can destroy the Washington
Machine and make liberty and freedom the default position in
Washington, D.C. -- instead of corruption, cronyism and bigger
government.

But that can only happen with your help and
generous financial support.

Unlike many of my opponents, my campaign
isn't funded by a bunch of Wall Street fat-cats and special
interests who are looking for special deals, breaks and bailouts.

I'm not "their guy," and I never will be. I'm
yours.

And I'm counting on you to please stand with
me during this most critical time.

I'm running for President not to "be
something" or because I need an ego boost. I'm running to restore
America by ushering in real, bold limited-government reforms,
including:

*** CUT TAXES AND SPENDING. My Fair and Flat
Tax plan will blow up the tax code and start over, return $2
TRILLION to the American people over ten years, grow our GDP by a
whopping 10% and result in at least 1.4 million new jobs;

*** PASS TERM LIMITS to end the reign of
career politicians in Washington, D.C. who never have to face
voters in a serious election;

*** FORCE MEMBERS OF CONGRESS TO READ THE
BILLS THEY VOTE ON, and stop their habit of ramming thousand-page
bills into law at the last minute before anyone knows what's in
them;

*** REPEAL ALL OF OBAMACARE to stop the
soaring health insurance premium costs, policy cancellations,
shuttered hospitals and poorer quality healthcare Americans are
now experiencing;

*** AUDIT THE FEDERAL RESERVE to end the
"print-now, ask-questions-later" policies that result in
never-ending boom-bust economic cycles, corruption and cronyism;

*** PROTECT THE ENTIRE BILL OF RIGHTS. That
means protecting our religious liberties, the right to life,
political speech, our gun rights and our Fourth Amendment right
to privacy from government spying.

For the first time in decades, you and I have
a true chance to nominate a Republican who will take a
sledgehammer to the Washington Machine.

This race could not be more wide open. So
every dollar counts.

With the September 30th FEC deadline rapidly
approaching, will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $20.16?

I know it's a lot. But this is the most
critical FEC deadline I've ever faced.

If it's just too much right now, please know
whatever you can afford to contribute will help my campaign
tremendously.

This is the last FEC deadline before I begin
my all-out push to 2016.

Every dollar you can give will help me pay
for the critical travel bills for the campaign stops, bumper
stickers, phone banks, U.S. mail, social media outreach and
Internet and TV ads it will take to surge to the top.

So please give as much as you can. Please
agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or whatever
you can afford at once!

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

P.S. The September 30th End of Quarter
Fundraising Deadline is rapidly approaching. This is by far THE
most critical fundraising deadline I've ever faced. PERIOD.

This massive field of 15 Republican
candidates is going to quickly start whittling down to just a
handful.

My campaign is laying the groundwork to surge
to the top, but I must be able to count on your support. Please
agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY!

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|
Peter -

I wanted to make sure you saw Dr. Carson's email from yesterday about Wednesday night's fundraising deadline, and remind you of one thing as well.

We are very close to having a record $10 million month. If you make a donation that happens to get us to our goal, you'll be invited to spend a day with Dr. Carson on the campaign trail.

I travel the country almost every day with Dr. Carson and I promise it will be a day you won't forget.

[Even if it's just $5 or $10, please make a donation now. ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30687794:sSZZ1nmN4:m:1:876315805:543FD9A253262D871AF2E1864C133055:r)

Thanks so much. You're the engine that keeps this campaign moving forward.

-Deana

Deana Bass
Press Secretary
Ben Carson for President

\--------------------------------------------------------

From: Ben Carson
To: Deana Bass
Subject: Time is running out

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30687794:sSZZ1nmN4:m:1:876315805:543FD9A253262D871AF2E1864C133055:r)
---

Peter, take a look at the clock above.

When it runs out, the critical third fundraising quarter will end. People around the country will be looking to see how much we raised. They'll want to see if we are serious.

We are extremely serious, and we're right on the verge of our most successful quarter to date.

[**I need your help now more than ever. Will you make a donation today?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30687794:sSZZ1nmN4:m:1:876315805:543FD9A253262D871AF2E1864C133055:r)

Despite the best efforts of the media and political establishment over the past week, our momentum is growing every day. A new _NBC/Wall Street Journal_ poll now has me tied for first place with Donald Trump.

We need to keep moving forward, and I cannot do it without you.

[**Please make a donation before Wednesday's critical deadline. I'm counting on you.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30687794:sSZZ1nmN4:m:1:876315805:543FD9A253262D871AF2E1864C133055:r)

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: President George H.W. Bush
subject: I'm asking, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc
body:
Dear Friend,

15--I'm guessing you have 15 other emails sitting in your inbox today from other Presidential candidates.

Here's why you should listen to this one.

Being President will test you to your core. Even though I was Vice President for eight years and had been in the Oval Office many times for important meetings with my friend President Reagan, I still did not appreciate the enormity of the job until I put my hand on that Bible and took the Oath of Office. It's that big.

And I can assure you, Jeb is ready for that big challenge. [**That 's why I'm asking you to get behind him today with a gift of $100, $50, or $25.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cjtrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsdhhhq_olrwwmqf.html)

**And, Friend, it really does have to be today.** **It 's not just the end of the month, it's the End of the Quarter deadline, the most important deadline of the campaign to date.**

This deadline isn't like all the others. Next week, Jeb and his campaign will have to publicly report how much money they have. [**We need your help to make sure Jeb keeps moving forward with his strong and positive message of American renewal.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bcdkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnldddz_olrwwmqf.html)

subject: Decisions, decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

We all have decisions to make.

We learned on Friday that the Speaker of the House made the decision to resign from Congress. His choice leaves space for the Tea Party to gain a huge advantage in Washington -- making the dysfunction worse than ever.

**The best thing we can do to mitigate the Tea Party damage is win the Florida Senate race, and help Democrats take back control of the Senate.**

So there's one big decision facing you today, friends -- **will you take action, right now, to help us win?**

[**The FEC deadline is in 24 hours and we haven 't reached our $50,000 goal yet. Will you contribute today to help us reach it?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20a2/738133e4/3ab1c115/7f8cd856/4100281953/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150929?refcode=pme150929_m&recurring=true")

I decided to run for Senate for the same reason I decided to run for Congress -- Washington is full of politicians who don't seem to want to get anything done.

I'm a CPA, so I do things a little differently than normal politicians. I'm not afraid of consensus and compromise -- in fact, I strive for it. Because that's how you make things work.

**Today, I hope you 'll make the decision to fight beside me. **[**If you can, make a contribution of $5 or more, and make sure we reach our $50,000 goal before tomorrow 's deadline.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20a2/738133e4/3ab1c115/7f8cd856/4100281953/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150929?refcode=pme150929_m&recurring=true")

Whether you decide to give or not -- thank you for being a part of this team. I couldn't do it without you.

subject: I’ll promise you this, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| As you know, Friend, **I’ve spoken with more voters in Iowa and South Carolina than any candidate in this race**. Every day, I meet folks who share our values — they want a better life for their children and grandchildren unburdened by government, they want to be protected from Radical Islam, and they want to fight Planned Parenthood. They’re hard working Americans, who deserve to have their voices heard.

Unfortunately, the media has chosen to ignore real Americans facing real issues. Instead, they are churning out story after story about petty Twitter fights and, of course, themselves.

There’s only one way I know how to fight back and that’s to continue to work, day-in and day-out, meeting and speaking with the folks who really matter to me — everyday Americans. **That’s the commitment I made from day one**. As other candidates choose to meet with big-money donors, I've made the commitment to hear what the people have to say. I’m sticking to that.

But I can’t do it alone, Friend. **I’m writing to ask a personal favor**. Are you able to **[chip in $25, $50, or $100](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commitment&n=1&v=4)** to keep me on the road as the only candidate taking on the issues that matter the most to us?

I’m committed to this. Will you join me?

\-- Rick

---

This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commitment&n=2&v=4) and let us know. If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. subject: They aren't laughing at us any more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Friend -
When we kicked off this campaign, people called us "fringe." They said we never had a chance against the big name candidates. They laughed at the fact that we were going to do this without a Super PAC.
But Bernie told them on day one, "people should not underestimate us."
Five months later, we're rocketing up the polls, and we are close -- very close -- to accomplishing something absolutely unprecedented: **announcing that our supporters have already made 1 million individual online contributions.**
But here's the hard part: we have to do it by Wednesday night at midnight when we close the books on a critical FEC fundraising deadline.
[**Make a contribution of $24 -- the average donation we've received in the last week -- and help us reach 1 million contributions before Wednesday at midnight.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22d6/43f17890/59c8cc18/621fff55/4212225121/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/1-million?refcode=em150929but")

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: They won't stop there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Governing by crisis is not what Maryland families need -- but it's what Republicans are intent on doing. With Speaker Boehner announcing his resignation, it's clear that the Tea Party has taken over the Republican Party. And they won't stop there. They're waging an ideological war against women's health and Planned Parenthood, and they're willing to shut down the government to get their way. We can't let that happen.

Playing partisan games with funding for medical research, veterans benefits, small business loans, and the other critical government programs is reckless and I've had enough. I fought back against these tactics in 2013 and I'm ready to keep fighting for as long as it takes.

If we want to stop the cycle of shutdowns and political brinksmanship, we know what we have to do: take back the Senate for Democrats, and that means winning right here in Maryland.

**In order to do that, we have to hit our $30,000 goal before the FEC deadline at midnight Wednesday. Can I count on you to help?**

[_**Stand with me today to help deliver a powerful message of support before our big FEC deadline on Wednesday.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ff5/70cdc2ba/47ace6a7/395e11a/898322324/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em92915AM_nd&amount=5.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Stand+with+me+today+to+help+deliver+a+po&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ff5/70cdc2ba/47ace6a7/395e111/898322324/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em92915AM_nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Donate+5+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")** **[Donate $15 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ff5/70cdc2ba/47ace6a7/395e12e/898322324/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em92915AM_nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+15+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")** **[Donate $25 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ff5/70cdc2ba/47ace6a7/395e125/898322324/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em92915AM_nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+25+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ff5/70cdc2ba/47ace6a7/395e138/898322324/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em92915AM_nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")** We're facing a huge Federal Election Commission deadline in less than 48 hours. In the face of these shutdown games, it's more important than ever that we have the resources we need to fight and take back the Senate for Democrats. **[Can you contribute today and help us reach our end-of-quarter goal?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ff5/70cdc2ba/47ace6a7/395e1cd/898322324/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em92915AM&amount=5.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Can+you+contribute+today+and+help+us+rea&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")**

Thank you,

Chris

name: Rand Paul
subject: I'm afraid this is bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The status quo equals failure.

The American people are FED UP because too many Republicans in Washington treat surrender as the first option.

As a result, the Republican nominating contest is wide open.

**[And with just under 30 hours remaining until the September 30th deadline, it's vital you chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30697451:W_p-cnmdN:m:1:879035888:4FF5686CC973DD1923AEA25C1C884232:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, I spoke on the Senate floor today about my opposition to the continuing resolution to fund the government.

If you want a President who will keep piling on $18 TRILLION in our national debt, there will always be a Bush or a Clinton for you to pick from.

The truth is, the continuing resolution rammed through the Senate today was a steaming pile of the same old madness.

With a continuing resolution, the Big Government gravy train chugs along.

ObamaCare is funded.

Planned Parenthood still draws over $500 million in taxpayer money.

Many excuses are made for why Republicans must surrender today in order to fight some other time in the future, which never seems to materialize.

Thanks to you, Republicans won stunning sweeps of both houses of Congress...but nothing seems to change.

The bottom line is, under the plans I've pushed my colleagues to adopt, it would take 60 votes to fund Planned Parenthood.

It would take 60 votes to fund ObamaCare.

With our nation mired so deeply in debt, this would be a huge step in cutting spending.

Republicans' refusal to use the power of the purse has created a grassroots uprising that has already caused John Boehner to announce he is resigning as Speaker of the House at the end of October.

And the establishment politicians all the pundits assumed would waltz to the GOP nomination are being rejected by the voters.

My campaign has made a TV ad detailing why I'm the one constitutional conservative in this race with a plan to defeat the Washington Machine.

**[I hope you will take a few moments to watch it](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30697451:W_p-cnmdN:m:1:879035888:4FF5686CC973DD1923AEA25C1C884232:r)**.

The Democrats are "relentless" in pursuing their principles, Cruz said, which include ever-increasing government spending and unlimited abortion rights. They're "willing to crawl over broken glass with a knife between their teeth to fight for their principles," Cruz said.

Republican leadership "reflexively surrenders," Cruz said. "President Obama simply has to utter the word 'shutdown' and Republican leadership runs for the hills."...

...Republican leadership told voters they needed a majority in the House of Representatives in 2010, and a majority in the Senate in 2014 in order to effectively oppose Obama. "It would have been better if the Republican majorities did 'absolutely nothing,'" he said, but they took the lead in imposing the cromnibus, Obamacare, executive amnesty, continued funding of Planned Parenthood, and confirming Loretta Lynch as attorney general -- even after she promised to act as lawlessly as Eric Holder and to never oppose Obama.

body:
Dear Friend,

I'm not a big emailer like my son, Jeb.

But as you may have heard him say out on the campaign trail, they call me "The Enforcer" in our family. I am told by very reliable sources inside the campaign it is meant as a compliment!

Anyway, after my George emailed you just recently, the campaign team asked me to reach out ahead of the End of Quarter Deadline to see if you could help.

[**There are only 30 hours left to donate, and I know it would mean the world to Jeb if he had your support. Please consider a generous gift of $50, $25, $10 or whatever you can afford right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wdsqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhlfdfl_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

I am biased, of course, but when I look at the field of candidates I am convinced Jeb is -- without question -- the best choice to be the next president. These are challenging times for our country, but Jeb has the optimistic vision and proven leadership skills to get America back on the right track.

[**With your help, we can make that a reality, but not without you.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dtckzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbpgtgh_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Friend, I'm asking you directly, step up and contribute $50, $25, or $10 before Jeb's big fundraising deadline tomorrow, and make this a reality: [**Jeb2016.com/September-Supporter/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/amyzrylgsphnbcbmnywzsnvcllnvgcrgzytyhgckbmby_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

I'm looking forward to having you on the team.

Sincerely,

Barbara Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/lmgpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclkzmzj_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: President George H.W. Bush
Date: September 29, 2015
Subject: I'm asking, Friend **

Dear Friend,

15--I'm guessing you have 15 other emails sitting in your inbox today from other Presidential candidates.

Here's why you should listen to this one.

Being President will test you to your core. Even though I was Vice President for eight years and had been in the Oval Office many times for important meetings with my friend President Reagan, I still did not appreciate the enormity of the job until I put my hand on that Bible and took the Oath of Office. It's that big.

And I can assure you, Jeb is ready for that big challenge. [**That 's why I'm asking you to get behind him today with a gift of $100, $50, or $25.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zrmjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcmzrzl_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**And, Friend, it really does have to be today.** **It 's not just the end of the month, it's the End of the Quarter deadline, the most important deadline of the campaign to date.**

This deadline isn't like all the others. Next week, Jeb and his campaign will have to publicly report how much money they have. [**We need your help to make sure Jeb keeps moving forward with his strong and positive message of American renewal.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/kllkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzhtltd_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Sincerely,

President George H.W. Bush

name: Kyle Jarrett, Van Hollen for Senate
subject: FW: They won't stop there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Chris's email.

There are just over 36 hours to go until the critical FEC deadline and I can't emphasize enough just how big this deadline is for our campaign. **[Can Chris count on you to come through before midnight Wednesday? Click here to give what you can and support Chris today.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffe/70cdc2ba/47ab7425/395f570/2099116118/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em92915_2nd&&amount=5.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Can+Chris+count+on+you+to+come+through+b&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")**

Thank you,
Kyle Jarrett
Digital Director
Van Hollen for Senate

_\----Original Message ----_
From: Chris Van Hollen
Sent: Tuesday, September 29, 2015
Subject Line: They won't stop there Friend,

Governing by crisis is not what Maryland families need -- but it's what Republicans are intent on doing. With Speaker Boehner announcing his resignation, it's clear that the Tea Party has taken over the Republican Party. And they won't stop there. They're waging an ideological war against women's health and Planned Parenthood, and they're willing to shut down the government to get their way. We can't let that happen.

Playing partisan games with funding for medical research, veterans benefits, small business loans, and the other critical government programs is reckless and I've had enough. I fought back against these tactics in 2013 and I'm ready to keep fighting for as long as it takes.

If we want to stop the cycle of shutdowns and political brinksmanship, we know what we have to do: take back the Senate for Democrats, and that means winning right here in Maryland.

**In order to do that, we have to hit our $30,000 goal before the FEC deadline at midnight Wednesday. Can I count on you to help?**

[_**Stand with me today to help deliver a powerful message of support before our big FEC deadline on Wednesday.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffe/70cdc2ba/47ab7425/395f509/2099116118/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em92915_2nd&amount=5.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+me+today+to+help+deliver+a+po&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffe/70cdc2ba/47ab7425/395f505/2099116118/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em92915_2nd&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+5+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")** **[Donate $15 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffe/70cdc2ba/47ab7425/395f503/2099116118/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em92915_2nd&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+15+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")** **[Donate $25 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffe/70cdc2ba/47ab7425/395f501/2099116118/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em92915_2nd&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+25+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffe/70cdc2ba/47ab7425/395f51e/2099116118/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em92915_2nd&&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")** We're facing a huge Federal Election Commission deadline in less than 48 hours. In the face of these shutdown games, it's more important than ever that we have the resources we need to fight and take back the Senate for Democrats. **[Can you contribute today and help us reach our end-of-quarter goal?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffe/70cdc2ba/47ab7425/395f51f/2099116118/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em92915_2nd&&amount=5.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Can+you+contribute+today+and+help+us+rea&utm_campaign=em92915AM&source=em92915AM")**

Thank you,

Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
